data.body:
=== Gerrit auto-lander epic f1fa (peridotite-thickset-pintail): full plan-review remediation — session close-out ===

OUTCOME: 14/14 tickets PASS plan-review + SIGNED. Tree: epic f1fa → S1(843b) S2(0ee8) S3(0525) S4(73f5) S5(3c55) S6(b825); S2→S2a(89f9) S2b(a9e3) S2c(1ccf); S5→S5a(08e1) S5b(ea61) S5c(9a6f) S5d(38be). S2/S5 sub-decomposed this session; the 7 tasks are new.

WHAT THE EPIC IS: a single-instance serial auto-lander for FFO `main` (ADR-0040). Agents set an `Autosubmit` label and walk away; the bot rebases the front change/chain to tip → awaits fresh Verified on every member → ancestor-atomic submits. On failure the whole stack is handed back with one typed outcome. R5 safety invariant: tested tree = merged tree (never weakened). Phase-1 serial; batching (idea c3a9) and provider-seam (idea 1701) and HA deferred.

HOW WE GOT THERE (round by round):

R1 — Residual (b)-edit fixes (user's initial ask): S2+epic AC1/AC8 stale "autolander-bot/bot-only vote ACL" → requester-votable Contributors ACL (bot casts no votes); S4→S5 heartbeat interface dep; CONTRIBUTING §FFO (nonexistent) → §2e Submit/ADR-0040; removed S4→ADR-0042 forward-ref; S5 existing-file edit targets (## Files + file_impact); declined over-spec. Re-review: epic PASS; S2/S4/S5 BLOCK.

R2 — Two process corrections from user:
  (a) Dropped --force on review-plan (edits already stale the attestation; plain review re-runs+re-signs). 
  (b) Retracted the over-specification decline; pinned poll=15s, heartbeat staleness=90s, histogram buckets — later revised to a RAW timer per prior art.
  Re-review caught my REST-submittable/FFO-landable disambiguation was INVERTED. Verified ADR-0040 (behind-tip = NON-submittable, not submittable=True). Corrected S2+S4.

R3 — Big BLOCK set on S2/S4/S5 (pre-existing design gaps). User: fix all non-design feedback; surface design decisions one at a time. FACT-CHECKED each (critical): rejected S2 BLOCK "/rebase:chain doesn't exist" as INVALID (verified POST /changes/{id}/rebase:chain exists on THIS instance's own docs). Applied ~30 mechanical fixes across S2/S4/S5 (per-member SHA tracking, re_drive_count, ancestor-atomic=POST /submit, DETAILED_LABELS, heartbeat-before-Autosubmit ordering, pinned exit codes, state volume + compose-up.sh SITE_SUBDIRS drift gate, ssm for_each, unhealthy=docker-event-not-journald, etc.). Correction found: on_behalf_of_uploader → rebase_on_behalf_of_uploader (RebaseInput field).

R4 — 7 design decisions. User: research how popular Gerrit projects handle each. Spawned research subagent (Zuul, LUCI CV/Chromium CQ, Gerrit primitives, Prow/Tide). User rule: strong convergence → auto-adopt; else surface one at a time. Result:
  D1 status surface → CQ pattern (outcome back to Gerrit change) + Zuul/Tide read-only HTTP status endpoint (heartbeat_age_s). CONVERGENT.
  D2 hand-back → CQ reset: remove Autosubmit + comment + S3 marker. CONVERGENT.
  D3 metrics → Zuul raw resident_time timer; percentiles downstream (CloudWatch extended stats), NO hard-coded buckets. CONVERGENT (dropped my pinned buckets).
  D4 unhealthy→restart → NOT convergent (prior art = K8s liveness). SURFACED → user chose willfarrell/autoheal sidecar.
  D5 Gerrit client → reuse, don't reimplement. Prior art said pygerrit2; SURFACED corrected (see R6). 
  D6 credentials → service-user HTTP password + rebase_on_behalf_of_uploader. CONVERGENT.
  D7 emergency-stop+drain → Zuul pause/graceful: sentinel file + graceful drain. CONVERGENT.

R4b — Structural + reliability feedback (user): (1) crash-recovery test (accepted); (2) sub-decompose heavy stories; (3) high-visibility failures (hangs/errors/stuck loud); (4) capture rationale in an ADR. Executed: S2→3 tasks, S5→4 tasks (story AC trimmed high-level); S5d crash-safe recovery.json + idempotency test; S5c loud metrics + time-in-phase stuck alarm; drafted ADR-0042 (8 decisions + prior-art + R5 + deferral triggers for 1701/c3a9/HA) attached to S6 + strengthened S6 AC.

R5–R9 — Task-level review triage (many rounds, converging). FACT-CHECKED throughout; corrected several of MY errors that reviews caught:
  - pygerrit2 (D5) was WRONG: repo's gerrit_client.py is stdlib-only "deliberately NO new httpx dependency". Reversed to a thin stdlib helper in infra/autolander; user asked me to explain the no-import rule (it's THIS epic's load-bearing separation-of-concerns; provider-seam deferred to 1701; peers extract-and-share eventually).
  - S5b All-Projects capability+submit grant was WRONG: project.config exclusiveGroupPermissions=submit eclipses inherited All-Projects submit, and RebarBotNava already ∈ Contributors (holds Submit). rebaseOnBehalfOfUploader is NOT a global capability — the Rebase access right is a per-ref ACL. Reworked S5b to rebar project.config (rebase = group Contributors), simplified smoke test to read-only provisioning checks (my elaborate submit-into-scratch test hit DCO requireSignedOffBy + submit-requirements — over-reach).
  - Real bugs caught + fixed: autoheal Docker socket must be READ-WRITE (:ro silently breaks docker restart); drain⇄autoheal race (recovery.json written FIRST on SIGTERM + keep heartbeating during drain); merged-change-can't-be-abandoned; mid-handback reframed as S3-marker condition not a wipChain phase; recovery rules for all phases (rebasing/awaiting_verified/submitting/idle/paused); HEALTHCHECK params pinned; stop_grace_period 120s vs Docker's 10s default; S5d depends_on S2a (loop.py creator) + S5a (Dockerfile creator).
  - S2c: ancestor-atomic = Gerrit "Submitted Together" (relation-chain + S3's assigned topic + submitWholeTopic) + partial-land safety check (verify ALL members MERGED).
  - S5c: alarm watches a published time_in_phase metric (not HTTP JSON); AUTOLANDER_HANDBACK marker; marker wire-format (token + JSON); status endpoint nginx route /autolander/status.

R-final — S3 (never edited by me; pre-existing, unsigned) reviewed to complete the tree: BLOCK on a non-existent infra-vs-test CI signal + the auto-recheck state machine. Fixed: gerrit-verify casts ONE undifferentiated Verified -1 (dropped the distinction); recheck trigger = post `recheck` comment (g2p recheck=verify → gerrit-verify.yaml); `rechecking` in-flight sub-state handles the transient Verified→0 from clear-vote (don't re-post, don't treat 0 as result). PASS+signed.

KEY LESSON: plan-review findings are NOT applied blindly — fact-check each against the live instance docs + repo config. This session rejected 2+ invalid BLOCKs (rebase:chain, All-Projects capability) AND caught several real bugs the reviews surfaced.

DEFERRED (in ADR-0042 with promotion triggers): 1701 provider-seam (2nd platform); c3a9 bounded-speculation batching (measured serial pain); HA/external-state (single-instance availability insufficient). Single-instance SPOF is an accepted Phase-1 tradeoff (degrades to manual, surfaced immediately as lander_down).

NEXT: implement via the parallel-agent workflow (claim leaf tasks, stacked Gerrit reviews). All claim-gate plan-review attestations are in place.
